title: Pastel Round Paper Plates – 10 Pack – 23cm Disposable Party Plates – Assorted Colours – Ideal for Baby Showers, Birthdays & Picnics (Pink)
features: Perfect for Celebrations: Ideal for baby showers, birthdays, picnics, and spring-themed parties.
Charming Pastel Colours: Includes four assorted pastel shades for a bright and stylish table setting.
Disposable Convenience: Use once and throw away—no washing up required.
Sturdy Paper Construction: Made from durable paper to hold snacks, desserts, and light meals.
Generous Size: Each plate measures 23cm in diameter—perfect for party portions.
description: Make party planning easy and stylish with these Pastel Round Paper Plates, perfect for baby showers, birthdays, and picnics. Each pack contains 10 disposable plates made from durable paper, designed to handle snacks, cake, and light meals with ease. Measuring 23cm in diameter, these round plates come in four assorted pastel colours that bring a cheerful, springtime touch to any table. Great for reducing cleanup time, these throwaway plates let you enjoy the celebration without the mess. Whether you’re hosting an outdoor gathering or themed indoor party, these pastel paper plates are a fun and functional tableware choice.
